summary: The video shows a traffic scene captured from a dashcam perspective as a vehicle drives along a multi-laned road under an overcast sky. Vehicles are seen traveling in both directions, with some cars stopped at intersections. Traffic signals are visible overhead, displaying green lights for通行. Trees line the sides of the road, and utility poles with wires run parallel to the roadway.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are present on the road, including trucks and sedans, moving in both directions.

uncertainties: Exact positions and velocities of all vehicles are not fully clear due to limited visibility.
Traffic signals are visible but their statuses beyond green are unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles or pedestrians.
